# eliza-portfolio

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Eliza Lees — UX & Product Design</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
  * { box-sizing:border-box; }
  :root {
    --cream: #F7F3EE;
    --warm-white: #FDFAF6;
    --sand: #E8DDD0;
    --clay: #C4A882;
    --terracotta: #B87355;
    --bark: #7A5C44;
    --ink: #2C2118;
    --mist: #D4C9BC;
    --sage: #8A9E8C;
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; background:var(--cream); color:var(--ink); overflow-x:hidden; }

  /* PASSWORD */
  #password-screen { position:fixed; inset:0; background:var(--ink); z-index:9999; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; transition:opacity 0.8s ease,visibility 0.8s ease; }
  #password-screen.hidden { opacity:0; visibility:hidden; pointer-events:none; }
  .pw-wrap { text-align:center; max-width:380px; width:90%; }
  .pw-monogram { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:3.5rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--clay); letter-spacing:0.15em; margin-bottom:0.25rem; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.3s forwards; }
  .pw-sub { font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:300; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--mist); margin-bottom:3rem; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.5s forwards; }
  .pw-field-wrap { opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.7s forwards; }
  #pw-input { width:100%; background:transparent; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.4); padding:0.75rem 0; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--cream); letter-spacing:0.1em; text-align:center; outline:none; transition:border-color 0.3s; }
  #pw-input::placeholder { color:rgba(212,201,188,0.4); letter-spacing:0.2em; font-size:0.75rem; text-transform:uppercase; }
  #pw-input:focus { border-bottom-color:var(--clay); }
  #pw-btn { margin-top:2rem; background:transparent; border:1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.5); color:var(--clay); padding:0.75rem 2.5rem; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s; display:block; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; }
  #pw-btn:hover { background:var(--clay); color:var(--ink); }
  .pw-error { margin-top:1rem; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
  .pw-error.show { opacity:1; }

  /* NAV */
  nav { position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:300; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:1rem 4rem; background:var(--cream); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.18); }
  nav::before { display:none; }
  .nav-logo { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.03em; color:var(--ink); text-decoration:none; font-style:italic; line-height:1; }
  .nav-links { display:flex; gap:2.5rem; list-style:none; position:relative; }
  .nav-links a { font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.3s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color:var(--terracotta); }

  /* HERO */
  #home { height:82vh; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .hero-left { display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; padding:4rem 4rem 2rem; position:relative; z-index:2; }
  .hero-eyebrow { font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); margin-bottom:0.4rem; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.2s forwards; }
  .hero-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(1.6rem,2.4vw,2.4rem); font-weight:300; line-height:1.1; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:0.4rem; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.4s forwards; }
  .hero-name em { font-style:italic; color:var(--terracotta); }
  .hero-desc { font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:300; line-height:1.65; color:var(--bark); max-width:360px; margin-bottom:1rem; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.6s forwards; }
  .hero-cta { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.75rem; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); text-decoration:none; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.8s forwards; transition:gap 0.3s; }
  .hero-cta:hover { gap:1.25rem; }
  .hero-cta::after { content:'→'; font-size:1rem; }
  .hero-right { position:relative; overflow:hidden; min-height:0; }
  .hero-image-frame { position:absolute; inset:0; border-radius:0; overflow:hidden; opacity:0; animation:fadeIn 1.2s ease 0.5s forwards; }
  .hero-image-frame img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }
  .hero-image-placeholder { width:100%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--sand) 0%,var(--mist) 50%,var(--clay) 100%); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:1rem; cursor:pointer; }
  .placeholder-icon { width:48px; height:48px; border:1.5px solid rgba(122,92,68,0.4); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.2rem; color:var(--bark); }
  .placeholder-text { font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); text-align:center; line-height:1.6; }
  .hero-scroll { position:absolute; bottom:1.25rem; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:0.3rem; opacity:0; animation:fadeIn 1s ease 1.2s forwards; cursor:pointer; }
  .scroll-line { width:1px; height:32px; background:rgba(184,107,75,0.25); position:relative; overflow:visible; }
  .scroll-dot { position:absolute; width:5px; height:5px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--terracotta); left:-2px; top:0; animation:scrollTravel 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; }
  .scroll-label { font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--clay); }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding:8rem 4rem; }
  .section-label { font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); margin-bottom:0.4rem; }
  .section-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.5rem); font-weight:300; line-height:1.15; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
  .section-title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--terracotta); }

  /* PROJECTS */
  #projects { background:var(--warm-white); padding-top:4rem; padding-bottom:4rem; }
  .projects-header { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:2rem; }
  .project-card:first-child { grid-column:1/-1; aspect-ratio:16/7; }
  .project-card:not(:first-child) { aspect-ratio:4/3; }
  .project-image { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition:transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); }
  .project-card:hover .project-image { transform:scale(1.04); }
  .project-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(44,33,24,0.95) 0%,rgba(44,33,24,0.4) 50%,rgba(44,33,24,0.1) 75%,transparent 100%); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-end; padding:2.5rem; opacity:1; transition:opacity 0.4s; }
  .project-card:hover .project-overlay { opacity:1; }
  .project-tag { font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--clay); margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
  .project-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--cream); line-height:1.2; }
  .view-work-cta { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(247,243,238,0.7); margin-top:0.6rem; transition:color 0.3s,gap 0.3s; }
  .view-work-cta::after { content:'→'; font-size:0.75rem; transition:transform 0.3s; }
  .project-card:hover .view-work-cta { color:var(--cream); gap:0.75rem; }
  .project-card:hover .view-work-cta::after { transform:translateX(3px); }
  .project-arrow { position:absolute; top:2rem; right:2rem; width:36px; height:36px; border:1px solid rgba(247,243,238,0.4); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:var(--cream); font-size:0.9rem; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s,transform 0.3s; transform:translate(-4px,4px); }
  .project-card:hover .project-arrow { opacity:1; transform:translate(0,0); }
  .watch-btn { position:absolute; bottom:2.5rem; right:2.5rem; background:rgba(247,243,238,0.95); border:none; padding:0.7rem 1.5rem; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink); cursor:pointer; border-radius:100px; z-index:20; transition:all 0.3s; box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(44,33,24,0.3); opacity:0; }
  .project-card:hover .watch-btn { opacity:1; }
  .watch-btn:hover { background:var(--terracotta); color:var(--cream); }

  /* ABOUT */
  #about { background:var(--cream); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; text-align:left; max-width:680px; margin:0 auto; padding:8rem 4rem; }
  .about-image-wrap { width:220px; margin:0 auto 2.5rem auto; }
  .about-image-frame { aspect-ratio:1/1; overflow:hidden; border-radius:50%; position:relative; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); animation:floatPhoto 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @media (hover:hover) { .about-image-frame:hover { transform:rotate(360deg) scale(1.05); animation:none; } }
  .about-image-frame img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition:transform 0.6s ease; }
  .about-image-frame img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center center; filter:saturate(0.75) brightness(1.05); mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,black 45%,transparent 78%); -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,black 45%,transparent 78%); }
  .about-accent { display:none; }
  .about-text { width:100%; }
  .about-body { font-size:1rem; font-weight:300; line-height:1.9; color:var(--bark); margin-bottom:2rem; }
  .about-skills { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem; margin-top:2rem; }
  .skill-tag { font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); border:1px solid var(--mist); padding:0.4rem 0.9rem; border-radius:100px; transition:all 0.3s; }
  .skill-tag:hover { background:var(--sand); border-color:var(--clay); color:var(--terracotta); }

  /* CONTACT */
  #contact { background:var(--ink); text-align:center; padding:5rem 4rem 4rem; }
  #contact .section-label { color:var(--clay); }
  #contact .section-title { color:var(--cream); }
  .contact-sub { font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--mist); max-width:480px; margin:0 auto 3rem; line-height:1.8; }
  .contact-email { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem); font-weight:300; color:var(--clay); text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:0.05em; display:block; margin-bottom:2rem; transition:color 0.3s; }
  .contact-email:hover { color:var(--cream); }
  .contact-links { display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:2rem; list-style:none; }
  .contact-links a { font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--mist); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.3s; }
  .contact-links a:hover { color:var(--clay); }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer { background:var(--ink); border-top:1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.15); padding:1rem 4rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
  .footer-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--mist); letter-spacing:0.05em; }
  .footer-copy { font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(212,201,188,0.4); }

  /* VIDEO MODAL */
  .video-modal { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(44,33,24,0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); z-index:600; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .video-modal.open { display:flex; }
  .video-wrap { position:relative; width:90%; max-width:900px; aspect-ratio:16/9; border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden; }
  .video-wrap iframe { width:100%; height:100%; border:none; }
  .video-close { position:absolute; top:-2.5rem; right:0; background:transparent; border:none; color:var(--cream); font-size:1.2rem; cursor:pointer; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; letter-spacing:0.1em; opacity:0.7; transition:opacity 0.2s; }
  .video-close:hover { opacity:1; }

  /* PROJECT MODAL */
  .cs-nav { position:absolute; bottom:1.25rem; right:1.5rem; display:flex; gap:0.75rem; z-index:10; }
  .cs-nav-btn { background:var(--cream); border:1px solid rgba(44,33,24,0.25); color:var(--ink); font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:0.4rem 0.9rem; border-radius:20px; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.2s; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(44,33,24,0.12); }
  .cs-nav-btn:hover { background:var(--terracotta); border-color:var(--terracotta); color:var(--cream); }
  .cs-nav-btn:disabled { opacity:0.25; cursor:default; pointer-events:none; }
  .cs-modal { background:var(--cream); max-width:1100px; width:96%; max-height:94vh; overflow-y:auto; margin:auto; border-radius:4px; position:relative; }
  .cs-hero-img-wrap { width:100%; max-height:320px; overflow:hidden; background:var(--ink); }
  .cs-hero-img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }
  .cs-header { padding:2.5rem 2.5rem 0; }
  .cs-tag { font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); margin-bottom:0.75rem; }
  .cs-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:2.2rem; font-weight:400; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:1rem; line-height:1.2; }
  .cs-tagline { font-size:1rem; color:var(--ink); opacity:0.7; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:0; }
  .cs-meta-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem 2rem; padding:1.5rem 2.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(44,33,24,0.08); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(44,33,24,0.08); margin-top:1.5rem; }
  .cs-meta-item { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.2rem; }
  .cs-meta-label { font-size:0.55rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); }
  .cs-meta-value { font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--ink); font-weight:500; }
  .cs-divider { border:none; border-top:1px solid rgba(44,33,24,0.08); margin:0 2.5rem; display:none; }
  .cs-section { padding:1.75rem 2.5rem 0; }
  .cs-section:last-of-type { padding-bottom:2.5rem; }
  .cs-section-label { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:600; font-style:italic; letter-spacing:0.01em; text-transform:none; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:0.75rem; padding-bottom:0.5rem; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(44,33,24,0.12); display:block; }
  .cs-section-body { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--ink); line-height:1.75; opacity:0.85; }
  /* keep old modal close button styles */
  .project-modal { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(44,33,24,0.85); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); z-index:700; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:1.5rem; }
  .project-modal.open { display:flex; }
  .project-detail { background:var(--warm-white); max-width:780px; width:100%; max-height:88vh; overflow-y:auto; border-radius:4px; position:relative; }
  .project-detail-img { width:100%; aspect-ratio:16/8; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top; display:block; }
  .project-detail-body { padding:2.5rem 3rem 3rem; }
  .project-detail-tag { font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--terracotta); margin-bottom:0.75rem; }
  .project-detail-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:2.2rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:1rem; line-height:1.1; }
  .project-detail-tagline { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-style:italic; font-weight:300; color:var(--bark); line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:1.5rem; padding-bottom:1.5rem; border-bottom:1px solid var(--mist); }
  .project-detail-desc { font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:300; line-height:1.9; color:var(--bark); margin-bottom:1.5rem; }
  .project-detail-meta { display:flex; gap:2rem; flex-wrap:wrap; border-top:1px solid var(--mist); padding-top:1.5rem; margin-top:1.5rem; }
  .project-meta-label { font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--clay); margin-bottom:0.25rem; }
  .project-meta-value { font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:400; color:var(--ink); }
  .project-detail-close { position:absolute; top:1rem; right:1rem; background:rgba(44,33,24,0.6); border:none; color:var(--cream); width:36px; height:36px; border-radius:50%; font-size:1rem; cursor:pointer; z-index:10; transition:background 0.2s; }
  .project-detail-close:hover { background:var(--terracotta); }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
  @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0; } to { opacity:1; } }
  @keyframes scrollPulse { 0%,100% { opacity:0.3; transform:scaleY(1); } 50% { opacity:1; transform:scaleY(1.15); } }
  .reveal { opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px); transition:opacity 0.8s ease,transform 0.8s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }

  /* RESPONSIVE */

  /* BURGER MENU */
  .burger { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; padding:4px; z-index:200; }
  .burger span { display:block; width:22px; height:2px; background:var(--ink); border-radius:2px; transition:all 0.3s ease; transform-origin:center; }
  .burger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }
  .burger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity:0; }
  .burger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }
  .mobile-menu-overlay { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(44,33,24,0.4); z-index:200; }
  .mobile-menu-overlay.open { display:block; }


  /* PROJECT CARDS */
  .projects-grid { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; }
  .project-card { position:relative; overflow:hidden; cursor:pointer; background:var(--sand); width:100%; height:480px; }
  .project-card img { position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block; }

  @media (max-width:900px) {
    .projects-grid { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; }
    .project-card { width:100%; height:380px; }
  }

  @media (max-width:600px) {
    .projects-grid { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; }
    .project-card { width:100%; height:240px; }
  }

  @media (max-width:900px) {
    nav { padding:1.25rem 2rem; background:var(--cream); }
    section { padding:5rem 2rem; }
    #home { grid-template-columns:1fr; height:auto; max-height:none; }
    .hero-left { padding:7rem 2.5rem 3rem; }
    .hero-right { height:55vw; min-height:320px; }
    .hero-image-frame { inset:0; }
    #about { padding:5rem 2rem; }
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr !important; gap:2rem !important; }

    footer { flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; text-align:center; padding:2rem; }
    #experience { padding:4rem 2rem !important; }
    #experience .experience-row { grid-template-columns:1fr !important; gap:0.5rem !important; }
    .contact-email { font-size:clamp(1.1rem,2.5vw,1.8rem); }
    #contact { padding:5rem 2rem; }
    /* Case study modal */
    .cs-modal { width:95%; max-height:95vh; }
    .cs-header { padding:1.5rem 1.5rem 0; }
    .cs-meta-row { padding:1.25rem 1.5rem; gap:1rem; }
    .cs-section { padding:1.25rem 1.5rem 0; }
    .cs-section:last-of-type { padding-bottom:2rem; }
    .cs-nav { bottom:0.75rem; right:0.75rem; }
    #cs-research-wrap > div { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr !important; }
    #cs-skims-screens-wrap > div > div:first-child { width:160px !important; }
  }

  @media (max-width:600px) {
    /* NAV */
    nav { padding:0.85rem 1.25rem; }
    .burger { display:flex; }
    .nav-links { position:fixed; top:0; right:0; bottom:0; width:72%; max-width:280px; background:var(--cream); flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; align-items:flex-start; gap:0; padding:4rem 2rem; z-index:250; transform:translateX(100%); transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); box-shadow:-8px 0 32px rgba(44,33,24,0.12); display:flex; pointer-events:none; }
    .nav-links.open { transform:translateX(0); pointer-events:all; }
    .nav-links li { width:100%; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(44,33,24,0.08); }
    .nav-links li:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .nav-links li a { display:block; font-size:1rem; padding:1rem 0; letter-spacing:0.12em; color:var(--ink); }
    .nav-logo { font-size:2rem; }

    /* HERO */
    #home { grid-template-columns:1fr; height:auto; max-height:none; background:var(--cream); }
    .hero-left { padding:5.5rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; background:var(--cream); z-index:2; }
    .hero-right { height:80vw; min-height:300px; order:2; position:relative; }
    .hero-image-frame { inset:0; border-radius:0; }
    .hero-scroll { position:relative; bottom:auto; left:auto; transform:none; margin:1.25rem auto 0; order:3; }
    .hero-name { font-size:clamp(2rem,9vw,2.8rem) !important; line-height:1.1 !important; }
    .hero-eyebrow { font-size:0.58rem; margin-bottom:0.4rem; }
    .hero-desc { font-size:0.875rem; max-width:100%; margin-bottom:1.5rem; line-height:1.7; }
    .hero-cta { font-size:0.62rem; }

    /* SECTIONS */
    section { padding:3rem 1.25rem; }
    #experience { padding:3rem 1.25rem !important; }
    #projects { padding-top:2rem !important; padding-left:0 !important; padding-right:0 !important; }
    #about { padding:3rem 1.25rem; text-align:left; }
    #contact { padding:3.5rem 1.25rem; }
    .section-title { font-size:clamp(1.75rem,7vw,2.2rem); margin-bottom:0.4rem; }
    .section-label { font-size:0.58rem; }

    /* EXPERIENCE */
    .experience-row { display:block !important; }
    .experience-row > div:first-child { margin-bottom:0.5rem; }

    /* PROJECTS */
    .projects-header { padding:0 1.25rem; margin-bottom:1rem; }
    .project-overlay { padding:1.25rem; }
    .project-name { font-size:1.2rem; }
    .project-tag { font-size:0.55rem; }
    .view-work-cta { font-size:0.58rem; margin-top:0.4rem; }
    .watch-btn { bottom:1rem; right:1rem; padding:0.5rem 1rem; font-size:0.58rem; }

    /* ABOUT */
    .about-grid { display:block !important; }
    .about-photo-wrap { margin-bottom:1.5rem; width:140px !important; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; }
    .skills-tags { gap:0.4rem; }

    /* CONTACT */
    .contact-email { font-size:1rem; word-break:break-all; }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer { padding:1.5rem 1.25rem; flex-direction:column; gap:0.5rem; text-align:center; }

    /* CASE STUDY MODAL */
    .project-modal { padding:0; align-items:flex-end; }
    .cs-modal { width:100%; max-height:96vh; border-radius:8px 8px 0 0; }
    .cs-hero-img-wrap { max-height:180px !important; }
    .cs-header { padding:1.25rem 1.25rem 0; }
    .cs-title { font-size:1.4rem !important; line-height:1.2 !important; }
    .cs-tagline { font-size:0.85rem; }
    .cs-meta-row { flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.65rem; padding:0.9rem 1.25rem; }
    .cs-meta-item { min-width:60px; }
    .cs-section { padding:1rem 1.25rem 0; }
    .cs-section:last-of-type { padding-bottom:2.5rem; }
    .cs-section-body { font-size:0.875rem; line-height:1.7; }
    .cs-section-label { font-size:0.55rem; }
    .cs-tag { font-size:0.55rem; }
    .cs-nav { bottom:0.5rem; right:0.75rem; gap:0.4rem; }
    .cs-nav-btn { font-size:0.55rem; padding:0.3rem 0.6rem; }
    .project-detail-close { top:0.75rem; right:0.75rem; font-size:1rem; }

    /* RESEARCH GRID - single col */
    #cs-research-wrap > div[style*="grid-template-columns"] { grid-template-columns:1fr !important; }
    #cs-research-wrap { padding:1rem 1.25rem 0 !important; }

    /* SKIMS SCREENS - stack */
    #cs-skims-screens-wrap > div { flex-direction:column !important; align-items:center; gap:1rem !important; }
    #cs-skims-screens-wrap > div > div:first-child { width:130px !important; }
    #cs-skims-screens-wrap { padding:1rem 1.25rem 0 !important; }

    /* SKIMS FOOTER IMAGE */
    #cs-skims-img-wrap { max-height:160px !important; }

    /* EXPLORATION */
    #cs-explore-wrap { padding:1rem 1.25rem 0 !important; }
    #cs-explore-wrap img { border-radius:4px; }
  }
  @keyframes scrollTravel {
    0%   { transform:translateY(0);    opacity:0;   }
    15%  { transform:translateY(0);    opacity:1;   }
    85%  { transform:translateY(46px); opacity:1;   }
    100% { transform:translateY(50px); opacity:0;   }
  }

  @keyframes floatPhoto {
    0%, 100% { transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
    25% { transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(1deg); }
    75% { transform:translateY(4px) rotate(-1deg); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
var CORRECT_PASSWORD = 'Password123!';
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ document.getElementById('password-screen').classList.add('hidden'); var tb = document.getElementById('edit-toolbar'); if(tb) tb.style.display='flex'; var els = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal'); var obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){ entries.forEach(function(entry,i){ if(entry.isIntersecting) setTimeout(function(){ entry.target.classList.add('visible'); },i*80); }); },{threshold:0.1}); els.forEach(function(el){ obs.observe(el); }); });
function checkPassword() {
  var val = document.getElementById('pw-input').value;
  if (val === CORRECT_PASSWORD) {
    document.getElementById('password-screen').classList.add('hidden');
    var tb = document.getElementById('edit-toolbar');
    if(tb) tb.style.display = 'flex';
    var els = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
    var obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      entries.forEach(function(entry, i) {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) setTimeout(function(){ entry.target.classList.add('visible'); }, i*80);
      });
    }, {threshold:0.1});
    els.forEach(function(el){ obs.observe(el); });
  } else {
    var err = document.getElementById('pw-error');
    err.classList.add('show');
    document.getElementById('pw-input').value = '';
    setTimeout(function(){ err.classList.remove('show'); }, 2500);
  }
}
function openVideo() {
  document.getElementById('vimeo-iframe').src = 'https://player.vimeo.com/video/1177986621?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479';
  document.getElementById('video-modal').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeVideoModal() {
  document.getElementById('video-modal').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('vimeo-iframe').src = '';
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
var projectData = {
  anoro: {
    tag: 'Digitas Health · Healthcare · Desktop & Mobile',
    title: 'Anoro — COPD Family Story',
    tagline: "You're about to get a rare glimpse into a family chat, revealing the hidden impact of COPD — not just on the patient, but on their loved ones too.",
    role: 'UX Designer',
    teamSize: '10',
    client: 'GSK',
    year: '2025',    problem: 'COPD is a widely misunderstood condition. Patients often dismiss early symptoms, and the emotional burden on families goes largely unseen. Traditional pharmaceutical content felt clinical and disconnected — it was not landing with the people who needed it most.',
    solution: 'A three-phase campaign built around a narrative microsite — the Hopkins Family Story. We created an immersive WhatsApp-style experience that follows the Hopkins family across four chapters, each released in phases driven by targeted banners and emails. As users scroll, the story unfolds through real family messages with contextual medical information woven alongside — a dual-pane layout balancing emotional storytelling with clinical accuracy. Phase 1 identified the problem, Phase 2 deepened the tension, and Phase 3 brought resolution — funnelling HCPs through the full story and into a local Anoro Start Strong campaign page.',
    explorationImg: 'image/',
    constraints: 'Pharmaceutical guidelines placed tight restrictions on what could be shown, said and how it was presented — every piece of copy required medical, legal and regulatory sign-off. The challenge was preserving the emotional integrity of the narrative within those boundaries, without it ever feeling like a compliance exercise. Operating as the sole UX across a cross-functional team, decisions had to be made quickly, clearly and with full awareness of downstream development implications.',
    outcome: 'Took this project from the brief through initial thinking to high-fidelity wires and handoff to development. A campaign that broke the mould of typical pharmaceutical communications — emotionally led, narratively structured and built to perform across desktop and mobile. The work demonstrated that compliance and creativity are not mutually exclusive, and set a new benchmark for how Digitas Health approaches HCP engagement.',
    phones: true
  },
  skims: {
    tag: 'AKQA · Mobile · UX',
    title: 'SKIMS',
    tagline: 'Using the current .com experience, our goal was to create, enhance and develop a mobile application that is made for millions but tailored to you.',
    role: 'UX Designer',
    teamSize: '14',
    client: 'SKIMS',
    year: '2023',
    problem: 'With a separately managed e-commerce site, the decision was pre-defined to move in the direction of a mobile app as their primary customer-facing channel — giving customers control of the entire SKIMS ecosystem from their smartphone. New and returning customers often arrive unsure of what they are looking for; size, fit, comfort, shape. SKIMS wanted to ensure we helped customers celebrate who they are and personalise their experience so that it felt refreshingly simple.',
    skimsImg: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    keyDecision: 'We prioritised guided personalisation over open browsing to reduce decision fatigue and help users quickly find products suited to their body and preferences.',
    research: true,
    solution: 'We designed a mobile experience centred around guided personalisation — helping users quickly identify products aligned to their body, preferences, and intent. The experience prioritised clarity, confidence, and ease of navigation across the full SKIMS product range.',
    constraintsLabel: 'Constraints & Usability Challenges',
    constraintsHtml: null,
    learnings: 'With the pressure of tight timelines and the scope of this project, we had to work at pace and systematically — ensuring all aspects of the app were accounted for without compromising the experience. Continuous check-ins with the team and weekly client presentations quickly resolved any open questions or issues. Design annotations are always key, and staying one step ahead of the developers kept the build running smoothly.'
  },
  health: {
    tag: 'Side Project · AI Tools · End-to-End',
    title: 'ClariMed - an AI literacy layer for healthcare',
    tagline: 'Replacing dense clincial (pdf) documents with an adaptive, AI-powered layer that explains medical information in the moments patients need it most.',
    role: 'End-to-End Product/UX Designer',
    context: 'Side Project',
    platform: 'Web & Mobile',
    duration: '5 weeks',
    year: '2026' ,
    problem: 'In healthcare, patient-facing information is typically delivered through dense, medically-worded PDFs. At the treatment endpoint, HCPs have limited time, patients are overwhelmed, and recall is poor. The gap between what is communicated and what is understood is vast.',
    pullQuote: 'The gap is not between what clinicians know and what they say. It's between what patients hear and what they can act on.', 
    design strategy: 'Instead of re-designing a document, I reframed the question entirely: what if AI acted as a translator between clincial language and lived experience? ClariMed is not a patient portal or a chatbot. It is a contextual layer - a system that sits alongside existing clincial workflows and adapts medical information to the person receivng it, in real time. ',
    principles: [
      {
        number: '01' , 
        title: 'Copilot, not authority' , 
        body: 'AI must support understanding while keeping clincial decisions with HCP and patient. No confidence claism. No diagnostic language.'
      }
      {
        number: '02' , 
        title: 'Zero friction at the point of care' , 
        body: 'HCPs have seconds, not minutes. Any feature that extended consultation time was cut. Calrity had to be instant.'
      }
      {
        number: '03' , 
        title: 'Complete transparency' , 
        body: 'AI confidence levels, source attribution, and approved content boundaries were designed in from day one - not bolted on.'
      }
    ], 
    aiProcess: 'This project was as much as experiment in AI-native design practice as it was in product design. I used AI tools not as shortcut generators but as thinking partners at different stages of the process - each chosen for a specific cognitive function.' 
    tools: [ 
      { name: 'Notebook LM', role: 'Research synthesis'},
      { name: 'Userology' , role: 'Qual research' },
      { name: 'Claude', role: 'Scenario & edge-case testing' },
      { name: 'Notion AI', role: 'Insight structuring'},
      { name: 'Loveable', role: Rapid UI prototypying' }, 
    ]
    aiProcessDetail: 'NotebookLM synthesised a corpus of health literacy research rapidly. Userology and Google Surveys generated real user signal without the cost of a full research sprint. Claude enabled adversarial scenario testing. Lovable compressed UI prototyping from weeks to days — allowing iteration on interaction logic, not just visual polish. The result was a compressed, high-fidelity design process that proved AI tooling can replicate the output of a cross-functional team — when you have a clear design strategy directing it.',
    outcomes: [
      {
        title: 'End-to-end concept', 
        body: 'Fully designed and prototyped adaptive literacy system, from research synthesis to interactive UI.' 
      }, 
      {
        title: 'Multi-tool AI pipeline', 
        body: 'Through the support of AI, I was able to create a system that simplifies and personalises medical information at the point of care - translating clinical language into cleear, accessible content that patients can actually act on.' 
      }, 
      { 
        title: 'Systemic and Strategic lens', 
        body: 'Reframed the idea that documents are often a static PDF to what is the "missing layer in the care system" - a stragic shift, not a UI fix.' 
      },
    ]
    reflection: 'The most important design decision was refusing to design a document. Healthcare has too many documents. What it lacks is a layer between clinical language and human understanding — something adaptive, contextual, and genuinely patient-centred. ClariMed is a prototype of that layer. It also taught me that AI-augmented design isn't faster because the tools are faster. It's faster because the right tools eliminate the moments where thinking gets stuck. Presented as part of the AI for Designers course with strong peer and tutor feedback.'
    }, 

function openProjectModal(id) {
  var data = projectData[id];
  if (!data) return;

  var imgMap = {anoro: 'img-anoro-desktop-1', skims: 'img-skims-modal', health: 'img-health-modal'};
  var imgEl = document.getElementById(imgMap[id]);
  var heroImg = document.getElementById('project-detail-hero-img');
  if (heroImg) {
    var src = imgEl ? imgEl.getAttribute('src') : '';
    if (src && src.length > 10) { heroImg.src = src; heroImg.style.display = 'block'; }
    else { heroImg.style.display = 'none'; }
  }

  document.getElementById('cs-tag').textContent = data.tag || '';
  document.getElementById('cs-title').textContent = data.title || '';
  var tl = document.getElementById('cs-tagline');
  if (tl) { tl.textContent = data.tagline || ''; tl.style.display = data.tagline ? '' : 'none'; }

  var metaItems = [];
  if (data.role) metaItems.push({l:'Role',v:data.role});
  if (data.teamSize) metaItems.push({l:'Team',v:data.teamSize});
  if (data.client) metaItems.push({l:'Client',v:data.client});
  if (data.year) metaItems.push({l:'Year',v:data.year});
  if (data.agency) metaItems.push({l:'Agency',v:data.agency});
  if (data.platform) metaItems.push({l:'Platform',v:data.platform});
  if (data.duration) metaItems.push({l:'Duration',v:data.duration});
  var metaEl = document.getElementById('cs-meta');
  if (metaEl) { metaEl.innerHTML = metaItems.map(function(m){return '<div class="cs-meta-item"><div class="cs-meta-label">'+m.l+'</div><div class="cs-meta-value">'+m.v+'</div></div>';}).join(''); metaEl.style.display = metaItems.length ? '' : 'none'; }

  function setSection(bodyId, wrapperId, txt) {
    var body = document.getElementById(bodyId);
    var wrap = document.getElementById(wrapperId);
    if (body) body.textContent = txt || '';
    if (wrap) wrap.style.display = txt ? '' : 'none';
  }
  // Key decision callout
  var keyDecWrap = document.getElementById('cs-key-decision-wrap');
  var keyDecBody = document.getElementById('cs-key-decision-body');
  if (keyDecWrap && keyDecBody) {
    if (data.keyDecision) { keyDecBody.textContent = data.keyDecision; keyDecWrap.style.display = ''; }
    else { keyDecWrap.style.display = 'none'; }
  }

  // Research section (skims only)
  var researchWrap = document.getElementById('cs-research-wrap');
  if (researchWrap) researchWrap.style.display = data.research ? '' : 'none';

  // SKIMS shop screens
  var skimsScreensWrap = document.getElementById('cs-skims-screens-wrap');
  if (skimsScreensWrap) skimsScreensWrap.style.display = data.skimsImg ? '' : 'none';

  // SKIMS prototype CTA
  var skimsCtaWrap = document.getElementById('cs-skims-cta-wrap');
  if (skimsCtaWrap) skimsCtaWrap.style.display = (id === 'skims') ? 'flex' : 'none';

  // SKIMS bottom image
  var skimsImgWrap = document.getElementById('cs-skims-img-wrap');
  var skimsImg = document.getElementById('cs-skims-img');
  if (skimsImgWrap && skimsImg) {
    if (data.skimsImg) { skimsImg.src = data.skimsImg; } skimsImgWrap.style.display = data.skimsImg ? '' : 'none';
  }

  // Exploration image
  var exploreWrap = document.getElementById('cs-explore-wrap');
  var exploreImg = document.getElementById('cs-explore-img');
  if (exploreWrap && exploreImg) {
    if (data.explorationImg) {
      exploreImg.src = data.explorationImg;
      exploreWrap.style.display = '';
    } else {
      exploreWrap.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }
  setSection('cs-problem-body','cs-problem-wrap', data.problem);
  setSection('cs-solution-body','cs-solution-wrap', data.solution);
  // Constraints - handle HTML version and dynamic label
  var constraintsWrap = document.getElementById('cs-constraints-wrap');
  var constraintsLabel = document.getElementById('cs-constraints-label');
  if (constraintsWrap) {
    if (id === 'skims') {
      if (constraintsLabel) constraintsLabel.textContent = 'Constraints & Usability Challenges';
      constraintsWrap.style.display = '';
    } else if (data.constraints) {
      var constraintsBody = document.getElementById('cs-constraints-body');
      if (constraintsBody) constraintsBody.textContent = data.constraints;
      if (constraintsLabel) constraintsLabel.textContent = 'Constraints';
      constraintsWrap.style.display = '';
    } else {
      constraintsWrap.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }
  setSection('cs-outcome-body','cs-outcome-wrap', data.outcome || data.learnings);
  var outcomeLabelEl = document.getElementById('cs-outcome-label');
  if (outcomeLabelEl) outcomeLabelEl.textContent = data.learnings ? 'Key Learnings' : 'Outcome';
  setSection('cs-outcome-body','cs-outcome-wrap', data.outcome);
  // Key learnings override for skims
  var outcomeLabelEl = document.getElementById('cs-outcome-label');
  if (outcomeLabelEl) outcomeLabelEl.textContent = data.learnings ? 'Key Learnings' : 'Outcome';
  if (data.learnings) {
    var body = document.getElementById('cs-outcome-body');
    var wrap = document.getElementById('cs-outcome-wrap');
    if (body) body.textContent = data.learnings;
    if (wrap) wrap.style.display = '';
  }

  var phonesSection = document.getElementById('modal-phones-section');
  if (phonesSection) {
    phonesSection.style.display = data.phones ? 'block' : 'none';
    if (data.phones) {
      for (var pi = 1; pi <= 5; pi++) {
        var src = document.getElementById('img-phone-'+pi);
        var dest = phonesSection.querySelector('#modal-phone-'+pi);
        if (src && dest) dest.src = src.src;
      }
    }
  }

  currentProjectId = id;
  updateNavButtons();
  document.getElementById('project-modal').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  document.querySelector('.cs-modal').scrollTop = 0;
}
var projectOrder = ['anoro', 'skims', 'health'];
var currentProjectId = null;

function navigateProject(dir) {
  var idx = projectOrder.indexOf(currentProjectId);
  var newIdx = idx + dir;
  if (newIdx >= 0 && newIdx < projectOrder.length) {
    openProjectModal(projectOrder[newIdx]);
  }
}

function updateNavButtons() {
  var idx = projectOrder.indexOf(currentProjectId);
  var prev = document.getElementById('cs-prev');
  var next = document.getElementById('cs-next');
  if (prev) prev.disabled = idx <= 0;
  if (next) next.disabled = idx >= projectOrder.length - 1;
}

function toggleMenu() {
  var btn = document.getElementById('burger-btn');
  var links = document.getElementById('nav-links');
  var overlay = document.getElementById('mobile-overlay');
  btn.classList.toggle('open');
  links.classList.toggle('open');
  overlay.classList.toggle('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = btn.classList.contains('open') ? 'hidden' : '';
}
function closeMenu() {
  var btn = document.getElementById('burger-btn');
  var links = document.getElementById('nav-links');
  var overlay = document.getElementById('mobile-overlay');
  btn.classList.remove('open');
  links.classList.remove('open');
  overlay.classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
function closeProjectModalBtn() {
  document.getElementById('project-modal').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
</script>


<!-- PASSWORD SCREEN -->
<div id="password-screen" style="display:none!important;">
  <div class="pw-wrap">
    <div class="pw-monogram">EL</div>
    <div class="pw-sub">Portfolio</div>
    <div class="pw-field-wrap">
      <input type="password" id="pw-input" placeholder="Enter password" autocomplete="off">
      <button id="pw-btn" onclick="checkPassword()">Enter</button>
      <div class="pw-error" id="pw-error">Incorrect password</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- VIDEO MODAL -->
<div class="video-modal" id="video-modal" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeVideoModal()">
  <div class="video-wrap">
    <button class="video-close" onclick="closeVideoModal()">✕ Close</button>
    <div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;width:100%;">
      <iframe id="vimeo-iframe" src="" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="CASESTUDY"></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROJECT DETAIL MODAL -->
<div class="project-modal" id="project-modal" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeProjectModalBtn()">
  <div class="cs-modal">
    <button class="project-detail-close" onclick="closeProjectModalBtn()">✕</button>

    <!-- HERO IMAGE -->
    <div class="cs-hero-img-wrap" style="position:relative;">
      <img id="project-detail-hero-img" class="cs-hero-img" src="" alt="" style="display:none;">
      <div class="cs-nav">
        <button class="cs-nav-btn" id="cs-prev" onclick="navigateProject(-1)">← Prev</button>
        <button class="cs-nav-btn" id="cs-next" onclick="navigateProject(1)">Next →</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HEADER -->
    <div class="cs-header">
      <p id="cs-tag" class="cs-tag"></p>
      <h2 id="cs-title" class="cs-title"></h2>
      <p id="cs-tagline" class="cs-tagline"></p>
    </div>

    <!-- META ROW -->
    <div id="cs-meta" class="cs-meta-row"></div>

    <!-- DIVIDER -->
    <hr class="cs-divider">

    <!-- PROBLEM -->
    <div id="cs-problem-wrap" class="cs-section">
      <p class="cs-section-label">Problem</p>
      <p id="cs-problem-body" class="cs-section-body"></p>
    </div>

    <!-- SOLUTION -->
    <div id="cs-solution-wrap" class="cs-section">
      <p class="cs-section-label">Solution</p>
      <p id="cs-solution-body" class="cs-section-body"></p>
    </div>

    <!-- EXPLORATION -->
    <div id="cs-explore-wrap" style="display:none;padding:1.75rem 2.5rem 0;">
      <p class="cs-section-label">Design Exploration</p>
      <p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;opacity:0.85;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">Two layout options were explored to solve a key content challenge — how to surface enough information to be meaningful without overwhelming the scroll experience. A core consideration was the mobile tray: teaser copy needed to have enough weight to make opening it feel worthwhile, feeding naturally into the full content without truncating mid-thought or leaving the user to expand for a single extra line. Option B was the preferred route — summarising all content upfront with visible CTAs that encouraged the next step, creating a more seamless and purposeful flow through the experience.</p>
      <div style="background:var(--sand);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;padding:1.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">
        <img id="cs-explore-img" src="" alt="Design exploration — layout options" style="width:100%;border-radius:4px;display:block;">
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- RESEARCH (SKIMS only) -->
    <div id="cs-research-wrap" style="display:none;padding:1.75rem 2.5rem 0;">
      <p class="cs-section-label">Research &amp; Discovery</p>
      <p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;opacity:0.85;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Four core customer beliefs shaped the design direction — surfaced through research and usability testing across a broad range of customer archetypes.</p>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;">
        <div style="background:var(--sand);border-radius:6px;padding:1.25rem;">
          <p style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Finding What's Right For Me</p>
          <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">With a myriad of products and customer archetypes, personalisation is key — customers need to feel like they belong and can find what they're after with ease. Labelling, filters, signposting, iconography and messaging all play a role in getting this right.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--sand);border-radius:6px;padding:1.25rem;">
          <p style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Transparency Is Important</p>
          <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">As sustainability becomes a baseline expectation, customers are drawn to transparency in manufacturing and materials. Sale language, iconography, product recommendations and expected features all need to resonate clearly and honestly.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--sand);border-radius:6px;padding:1.25rem;">
          <p style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Education</p>
          <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">Customers want to understand what they're buying. Personalisation features, fit guidance and clear product information help customers feel confident — particularly important given the breadth of the SKIMS range and the diversity of its audience.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--sand);border-radius:6px;padding:1.25rem;">
          <p style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Product Is Key</p>
          <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">Whether exploring or searching with intent, product browsing is the core goal of any shopping experience. It must be well thought-out and intuitive — filters, signposting and interaction patterns all need to work seamlessly together.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>



    <!-- KEY DECISION CALLOUT -->
    <div id="cs-key-decision-wrap" style="display:none;padding:1.75rem 2.5rem 0;">
      <div style="background:var(--ink);border-radius:6px;padding:1.75rem 2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:100%;background:var(--terracotta);"></div>
        <p style="font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.5rem;padding-left:0.75rem;">Key Decision</p>
        <p id="cs-key-decision-body" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--cream);line-height:1.6;padding-left:0.75rem;font-style:italic;"></p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SKIMS SCREENS + FIGMA LINK -->
    <div id="cs-skims-screens-wrap" style="display:none;"></div>


    <!-- CONSTRAINTS -->
    <div id="cs-constraints-wrap" class="cs-section" style="display:none;">
      <p class="cs-section-label" id="cs-constraints-label">Constraints &amp; Usability Challenges</p>
      <div id="cs-constraints-body" class="cs-section-body"><p style="font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Challenges</p>
<p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;opacity:0.85;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Usability testing surfaced key gaps between user expectations and interface behaviour across product detail and landing pages.</p>
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
<div><p style="font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Iconography &amp; Labelling</p><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">"Buy more &amp; save" was frequently perceived as a primary action rather than a promotional message, misaligning user intent with interface design.</p></div>
<div><p style="font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Scroll Behaviour</p><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">Users expected the hero image to reset on scroll-up, rather than cycling through product angles — breaking their mental model of control.</p></div>
<div><p style="font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Generational Differences</p><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;">Interpretation of interaction patterns varied across age groups, impacting how users understood hierarchy, affordance, and intent.</p></div>
</div>
<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Usability testing insights" style="width:100%;border-radius:8px;display:block;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
<p style="font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Design Response</p>
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5rem;">
<div style="display:flex;gap:0.75rem;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:var(--terracotta);flex-shrink:0;">—</span><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;margin:0;">Refined labelling to reduce ambiguity and align with user intent.</p></div>
<div style="display:flex;gap:0.75rem;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:var(--terracotta);flex-shrink:0;">—</span><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;margin:0;">Adjusted interaction patterns to better match expected behaviours.</p></div>
<div style="display:flex;gap:0.75rem;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:var(--terracotta);flex-shrink:0;">—</span><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;margin:0;">Simplified visual hierarchy across product pages.</p></div>
<div style="display:flex;gap:0.75rem;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:var(--terracotta);flex-shrink:0;">—</span><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.7;opacity:0.85;margin:0;">Designed for broader usability across varying levels of digital familiarity.</p></div>
</div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- OUTCOME -->
    <div id="cs-outcome-wrap" class="cs-section">
      <p class="cs-section-label" id="cs-outcome-label">Outcome</p>
      <p id="cs-outcome-body" class="cs-section-body"></p>
    </div>
    <!-- PROTOTYPE CTA -->
    <div id="cs-skims-cta-wrap" style="display:none;padding:1.75rem 2.5rem 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;">
      <p style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;font-style:italic;color:var(--ink);margin:0;">View the experience</p>
      <a href="https://www.figma.com/proto/brbb84222dwF66vRxegI5b/SKIMS-User-Testing-Motion-Studies--1-?page-id=256%3A152821&type=design&node-id=365-55536&viewport=1146%2C-1774%2C0.25&scaling=min-zoom&starting-point-node-id=365%3A55536&show-proto-sidebar=1&t=TKvMSotObBFvLwJ2-9" target="_blank" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);text-decoration:none;border:1px solid var(--terracotta);padding:0.6rem 1.25rem;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;transition:all 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--terracotta)';this.style.color='var(--cream)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent';this.style.color='var(--terracotta)'">↗ View Prototype</a>
    </div>

        <!-- SKIMS IMAGE -->
    <div id="cs-skims-img-wrap" style="display:none;position:relative;margin-top:1.75rem;overflow:hidden;max-height:280px;background:var(--cream);">
      <img id="cs-skims-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="SKIMS app screens" style="width:100%;display:block;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;opacity:0.92;mix-blend-mode:normal;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:80px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--cream), transparent);pointer-events:none;"></div>
      <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:80px;background:linear-gradient(to top, var(--cream), transparent);pointer-events:none;"></div>
    </div>


    <!-- PHONE FRAMES (Anoro only) -->
    <div id="modal-phones-section" style="display:none;background:var(--ink);padding:3rem 2rem;margin-top:2rem;">
      <p style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--clay);text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Responsive Design</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--cream);text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;">Designed for <em style="color:var(--terracotta);">every screen</em></p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-end;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:0.5rem;">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0;width:100px;"><div style="background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 5px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);"><div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:9/19.5;"><img id="modal-phone-1" src="" alt="Opening" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"></div></div><p style="color:var(--clay);font-size:0.55rem;text-align:center;margin-top:0.5rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Opening</p></div>
        <div style="flex-shrink:0;width:100px;"><div style="background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 5px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);"><div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:9/19.5;"><img id="modal-phone-2" src="" alt="Chat begins" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"></div></div><p style="color:var(--clay);font-size:0.55rem;text-align:center;margin-top:0.5rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Chat begins</p></div>
        <div style="flex-shrink:0;width:100px;"><div style="background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 5px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);"><div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:9/19.5;"><img id="modal-phone-3" src="" alt="Story unfolds" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"></div></div><p style="color:var(--clay);font-size:0.55rem;text-align:center;margin-top:0.5rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Story unfolds</p></div>
        <div style="flex-shrink:0;width:100px;"><div style="background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 5px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);"><div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:9/19.5;"><img id="modal-phone-4" src="" alt="Message preview" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"></div></div><p style="color:var(--clay);font-size:0.55rem;text-align:center;margin-top:0.5rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Preview</p></div>
        <div style="flex-shrink:0;width:100px;"><div style="background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 5px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);"><div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:9/19.5;"><img id="modal-phone-5" src="" alt="Full info" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"></div></div><p style="color:var(--clay);font-size:0.55rem;text-align:center;margin-top:0.5rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Full info</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>


<!-- NAV -->

  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HOME / HERO -->
<section id="home">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">UX & Product Design</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Designing experiences<br>that <em>matter</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-desc">Design digital products and experiences that put human behaviour at the centre — turning complexity into clarity, and insight into experiences that users love and businesses can thrive on.</p>
    <a href="#projects" class="hero-cta">View my work</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="hero-image-frame" style="border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;" id="hero-img-frame">
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to right, var(--cream) 0%, rgba(243,237,228,0.5) 25%, transparent 55%);z-index:2;pointer-events:none;border-radius:8px;"></div>
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(243,237,228,0.3) 0%, transparent 40%);z-index:2;pointer-events:none;border-radius:8px;"></div><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Anoro project" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 15%;border-radius:0;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll" onclick="document.getElementById('projects').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
    <div class="scroll-line"><div class="scroll-dot"></div></div>
    <span class="scroll-label">Scroll</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="projects-header reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">Selected work</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Recent <em>projects</em></h2>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <!-- Anoro - full width, single image -->
    <div class="project-card" onclick="openProjectModal('anoro')">
      <img src="/Anoro.png/" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;">
      <div class="project-overlay" style="opacity:1;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(44,33,24,0.9) 0%,transparent 45%);">
        <span class="project-tag">Digitas Health · Desktop &amp; Mobile · UX</span>
        <div class="project-name">Anoro — COPD Family Story</div>
        <span class="view-work-cta">View the work</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-arrow">↗</div>
      <button class="watch-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openVideo()">▶ Watch the experience</button>
    </div>

    <!-- SKIMS -->
    <div class="project-card" onclick="openProjectModal('skims')">
      <img src="/SKIMS Header.png" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;display:block;">
      <div class="project-overlay">
        <span class="project-tag">Side Project · AI Tools · End-to-End</span>
        <div class="project-name">Health Literacy — AI for Designers</div>
        <span class="view-work-cta">View the work</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-arrow">↗</div>
    </div>

    </section>


<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience" style="background:var(--sand);padding:5rem 4rem;">
  <div style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;">
    <p class="section-label reveal">Background</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal" style="margin-bottom:3rem;">Experience</h2>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:200px 1fr;gap:3rem;margin-bottom:4rem;align-items:start;" class="experience-row" class="reveal">
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Digitas Health</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);">Nov 2023 – Present</div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;color:var(--bark);">End-to-end UX across a portfolio of global pharmaceutical clients including Pfizer, Eli Lilly, Novo Nordisk, and Takeda, often operating as the sole UX specialist across multiple accounts. I design and deliver a wide range of digital experiences — from DSPs and eDetails to websites, mobile interactions, and SEO-driven content — within complex regulatory and compliance environments. Embedded within Strategy, I partner closely with cross-functional teams spanning competitor analysis, market orientation, UX, and development, shaping solutions from initial brief through to build and optimisation.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--mist);margin-bottom:4rem;"></div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:200px 1fr;gap:3rem;margin-bottom:4rem;align-items:start;" class="experience-row" class="reveal">
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">AKQA</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);">June 2021 – Oct 2023</div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;color:var(--bark);">Worked across retainer clients and pitches to envision, create and reskin websites and mobile applications for clients such as SKIMS, AiScout, Bp, Choose Love and Bacardi.</div>
    </div>
      </div>
</section>


<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="about-inner">
  <div class="about-image-wrap reveal">
    <div class="about-image-frame"><img src="/Profile Picture 2.jpg" alt="Eliza Lees" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 35%;"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-text reveal">
    <p class="section-label reveal">About me</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">Hi, I'm <em>Eliza</em></h2>
    <p class="about-body reveal">I'm a UX designer driven by a deep curiosity in psychology — and how understanding human behaviour leads to sharper, more meaningful design. I work across research, UX and service design to build brand-led experiences that genuinely connect.<br><br>I'm excited by where the industry is heading. AI doesn't replace our thinking — it stretches it. It's a tool that pushes creativity further, opens up new ways of solving problems, and raises the bar for what we're capable of making.</p>
    <div class="about-skills reveal">
      <span class="skill-tag">Product Thinking</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">UX Strategy</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Interaction Design</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Design Systems</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Problem Framing</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">User Research</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Journey Mapping</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Information Architecture</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Service Design</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Strategic Thinking</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Product Design</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">AI Tools</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Let's work <em>together</em></h2>
  <p class="contact-sub reveal">I'm excited about what's next. Whether you have a role, a brief, or just an interesting problem — I'd love to hear from you.</p>
  <a href="mailto:elizalees@hotmail.co.uk" class="contact-email reveal">elizalees@hotmail.co.uk</a>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <span class="footer-name">Eliza Lees</span>
  <span class="footer-copy">UX & Product Design</span>
</footer>

<!-- EDIT TOOLBAR -->
<div class="edit-toolbar" id="edit-toolbar" style="display:none;position:fixed;bottom:2rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--ink);border:1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.2);border-radius:100px;padding:0.6rem 1.5rem;display:none;align-items:center;gap:1rem;z-index:200;">
  <span style="font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--clay);">✦ Edit mode</span>
</div>
<script>
document.getElementById('pw-input').addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') checkPassword();
});
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(a) {
  a.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var target = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
    if (target) { e.preventDefault(); target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); }
  });
});
</script>
<div id="img-store" style="display:none;">
  <img id="img-phone-1" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-phone-2" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-phone-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-phone-4" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-phone-5" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-anoro-desktop-1" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-skims-modal" src="data:image/png;base64,">
  <img id="img-health-modal" src="data:image/png;base64,
